Quality Assurance

KHAS – ÖZDESIS

Quality Assurance System

The internal quality assurance system of our university is designed as a platform that will enable academic and administrative units to evaluate themselves in line with strategic plans in the fields of education, research, financial and institutional structuring, and to develop the necessary improvement policies by identifying the goals achieved and areas open to improvement.

Continue…

Academic Principles and Policies

Our university adopts to develop policies in line with our academic principles in line with our strategic plans and goals.

Our Policy

Academic Principles

Reports

Our university regularly shares its reports with the public in order to inform our stakeholders in line with the principle of accountability.

Strategic Plan 2020-2024

UNGC Report

Institution Internal Evaluation Reports

Accreditation

Our university supports the accreditation processes of all programs by external institutions and organizations within the scope of quality assurance development studies in educational processes.

Read more…

Quality Commission Members

While the Academic Council bears the main responsibilities such as evaluating education-training, research and community service activities, administrative and financial processes within the quality assurance system, determining institutional indicators and submitting the results to the Senate for approval, the Quality Commission is responsible for ensuring that all these processes are disseminated and internalized throughout the university and that the quality assurance culture penetrates the capillaries of the university.

Read more…

International Memberships

Our university supports international higher education institution memberships in accordance with the internationalization policy prepared in line with the strategic plan.

Read more…
